scope: ACL 2027 supplement page-12 proxy-metric derivation companion v3 visual iteration

motivation.target_page_before: After page-1 and page-4 v2 passes, the round-10 full supplement density audit made page 12 the lowest non-reference page.
motivation.goal_alignment: Make the proxy-derivation spread more render-backed while preserving the metric-vs-task claim boundary.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for paired-render notation, PSNR, SSIM, and feature-similarity proxy equations
claim_boundary.notes: The v2 proxy-axis AI slot is not a metric, model prediction, benchmark row, render result, VLM output, navigation run, or task result. Registered render pairs and written equations remain the evidence-bearing content.

proxy_metric_axis_v2.role: AI-generated proxy-axis schematic only; deterministic code draws all paper-critical labels and claim-boundary text.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v3 figure enlarges the registered object and scene render pairs, uses the v2 proxy-axis schematic as a separate exposition card, and expands the bottom registered proxy render ladder with zoom-019 backpack and clock pairs.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 12 keeps the larger proxy companion and its caption on the page, starts PSNR below it, and does not shift the page-13 to page-15 derivation companions.

layout_iterations.change: Updated regression tests to require the registered proxy render ladder phrase, the 0.40 textheight include cap, the v2 proxy-axis slot, zoom-019 source registration, and a taller 1800x1200-plus figure.
layout_iterations.result: RED first: focused derivation tests failed on the old caption/source registry and old v1 slot.

layout_iterations.change: Generated and registered the v2 proxy-axis AI slot.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: text-free enough for deterministic relabeling and remains exposition only.

layout_iterations.change: Rebuilt the proxy derivation companion at 1800x1260 and enlarged the render-pair cards and bottom proxy render ladder.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: standalone layout-guard active fraction is 0.381409171 and page-12 active245 at 90 dpi rises from 0.13366731 to 0.15789212.

tests.result: RED before implementation: 2 failed, 72 deselected; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; regenerated fig_supplement_proxy_metric_derivation_companion.png from the v3 composer.
completed during layout review; paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf contains 45 A4 pages.
completed; pages 12-15 regenerated for local visual review.
completed; pages 12-15 regenerated for density review.
GREEN in the final verification pass: 74 passed.

tests.command: final figure, PDF text, PDF profile, git diff whitespace, and direct final-newline/trailing-whitespace scans
tests.result: exit 0; figure size is 1800x1260, figure layout-guard active fraction is 0.381409171, page-12 required caption phrases are present, local-path and author-name leakage checks passed, and touched text files have no trailing whitespace.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because the available subagent tool requires an explicit user request for delegation.
